scene_description: Starship captain private quarters with sleeping bunks on the left, console panels and storage on the right, and a sealed cabin door ahead.

global_ambience.label: ship cabin ambience
global_ambience.prompt: subtle futuristic starship cabin room tone, low ventilation rumble, distant hull resonance, quiet electrical presence, no speech, no music

regional_sources.label: left sleeping bunks
regional_sources.prompt: soft fabric rustle and quiet air circulation around compact sleeping bunks, gentle mechanical bedding creaks, no human voice

regional_sources.label: right console panels
regional_sources.prompt: subtle futuristic console electronics, low servo clicks, tiny interface beeps, screen hums and soft power supply noise, no speech

regional_sources.label: front cabin door
regional_sources.prompt: faint sealed bulkhead vibration and distant corridor machinery beyond a starship cabin door, muffled and steady, no speech

regional_sources.label: overhead light strips
regional_sources.prompt: barely audible overhead light strip buzz, clean futuristic fluorescent electrical tone, high and quiet, no melody
